# Manav Gupta

Official site: https://guptamanav.me/
Reading page: https://guptamanav.me/reading/

## Disambiguation

This page describes Manav Gupta (guptamanav.me), the San Francisco Bay Area product and operations executive. He is not to be confused with other individuals of the same name. His professional profiles are at https://www.linkedin.com/in/guptam/ and https://x.com/guptamanav.

## Canonical Summary

Manav Gupta is a global product and operations executive based in the San Francisco Bay Area with 25+ years of experience across Payments, Trust & Safety, Risk Management, Product Management, Customer Success, Global Operations, Executive Leadership, and Strategic Partnerships. He is currently Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb.

## Key Facts

- Full name: Manav Gupta
- Current role: Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb (2022–present)
- Location: San Francisco Bay Area, California, USA
- Total experience: 25+ years
- Core expertise: Payments, Trust & Safety, Risk Management, Product Management, Customer Success, Global Operations, Executive Leadership, Strategic Partnerships
- Companies: Airbnb, Meta, Intuit, Visa, PayPal, Microsoft
- Education: MBA from Ivey Business School at Western University; MS in Computer Science and eCommerce Technologies from DePaul University; BS in Electrical Engineering and International Business from Michigan Technological University
- Patents: 4 issued US patents (payments and commerce technology)
- Publication: Contributor to "User-Centered Web Site Development: A Human-Computer Interaction Approach"
- Volunteer role: Board of Directors, Close the Gap Foundation (2018–present), empowering first-generation, low-income students
- YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@guptamanav77 (trust & safety, product leadership, global operations)
- GitHub: https://github.com/guptamanav7

## Career Timeline

- 2022–present: Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations — Airbnb, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2020–2022: Product & Technical Program Manager, Payments — Meta, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2018–2020: Director, Product Management, Customer Success — Intuit, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2015–2018: Vice President, Product Management — Visa, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2013–2015: Director, Product Management, Risk — PayPal, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2008–2013: Senior Director, Global Product Innovation — Visa, San Francisco Bay Area
- 2004–2008: Senior Program Manager, Bing & adCenter — Microsoft, Greater Seattle Area

## Key Professional Achievements

At Airbnb: Directed a multi-million dollar portfolio covering Financial Fraud, Content Integrity, Identity, and Safety. Oversaw agentic AI for decision accuracy, generative AI for case summarization to reduce Average Handle Time (AHT), and Machine Learning (ML) driven risk signals to reduce false detections. Built and deployed a Salesforce backend for workflow optimization. Led a team of ex-law enforcement agents (FBI, Secret Service, Interpol) as first responders in life-safety incidents.

At Meta: Directed design, integration, and delivery of Facebook's payment gateway platform across Stripe, PayPal, Cielo, and Shopify in the US, UK, and Brazil. Shaped Go-To-Market (GTM) strategy for Facebook's consumer marketplace, Shops, and Charitable Giving Platform.

At Intuit: Improved product discoverability by 60 percentage points and reduced escalations by 81% through AI chatbot and self-help content strategy for QuickBooks Payments, Capital, and Developer Platform. Cut operational expenses by 28% through workflow and product efficiencies.

At Visa (2015–2018): VP of Product Management for a dispute resolution platform. Negotiated issuer and acquirer platform partnerships (Pegasystems, Data Support Systems, Lean Industries), driving 25% annual network growth.

At PayPal: Led the Resolutions and Protections Platform managing ACH, credit, and debit card claims and chargebacks. Delivered 100M impressions, $2B transaction volume, 3 bps loss reduction, and 10% fewer escalations. Integrated with Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, and PayPal Credit.

At Visa (2008–2013): Launched Visa Checkout (V.me) globally. Led product, customer experience, engineering, and GTM for Visa Developer Platform. Developed and secured approval for the $2B CyberSource acquisition.

At Microsoft: Integrated risk management for JellyFish and Farecast acquisitions, unlocking $100M in incremental ad revenue. Launched recurring and prepaid subscription capabilities for the commerce marketplace.

## Patents

Manav Gupta holds 4 issued US patents in payments and commerce technology:

1. Dynamic widget generator apparatuses, methods and systems
2. Social Checkout Widget Generation and Integration Apparatuses, Methods and Systems
3. Payment platform interface widget generation apparatuses, methods and systems
4. System and Method of Providing Customer Purchase Propensity Information to Online Merchants

## Publications

Contributor: "User-Centered Web Site Development: A Human-Computer Interaction Approach" — a foundational text applying Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) principles to web design, bridging computer science theory with real-world usability practice.

## Skills

- Executive Leadership: Cross-functional org design, P&L ownership, global team management
- Product Management: 0→1 and scaled product, agile transformation, roadmap strategy
- Global Operations: Scaled enforcement, BPO management, workforce planning
- Trust & Safety: Fraud, content integrity, identity, Account Takeover (ATO), bot mitigation
- Payments & Risk: Chargebacks, dispute resolution, ACH/card risk, loss optimization
- Strategic Partnerships: Issuer/acquirer negotiations, platform launches, GTM strategy

## Education

- MBA — Ivey Business School at Western University (Strategy and General Management)
- MS — DePaul University (Computer Science and eCommerce Technologies)
- BS — Michigan Technological University (Electrical Engineering and International Business)

## Reading List

Manav Gupta's reading page (https://guptamanav.me/reading/) is a curated collection of 33 books that have influenced how he thinks. Categories and representative titles:

Finance & Investing: Die with Zero (Bill Perkins), Rich Dad Poor Dad (Robert T. Kiyosaki), The Psychology of Money (Morgan Housel), Same as Ever (Morgan Housel), The Intelligent Investor (Benjamin Graham), The Richest Man in Babylon (George S. Clason), The Only Investment Guide You'll Ever Need (Andrew Tobias)

Health & Longevity: Outlive (Peter Attia MD), Complete Guide to Fasting (Dr. Jason Fung), The Obesity Code (Dr. Jason Fung), The Diabetes Code (Dr. Jason Fung), The Cancer Code (Dr. Jason Fung), The Circadian Code (Satchin Panda PhD), Saving My Neck (Timothy McCall)

Leadership & Business: Good to Great (Jim Collins), Measure What Matters (John Doerr), Principles (Ray Dalio), The Effective Executive (Peter F. Drucker), The Goal (Eliyahu M. Goldratt), The Toyota Way (Jeffrey K. Liker), Unreasonable Hospitality (Will Guidara)

Productivity & Habits: Atomic Habits (James Clear), The 4-Hour Workweek (Tim Ferriss)

Communication & Negotiation: Crucial Conversations (Kerry Patterson et al.), Crucial Communication (Kerry Patterson et al.), Never Split the Difference (Chris Voss), Nonviolent Communication (Marshall B. Rosenberg PhD), The 5 Love Languages (Gary Chapman)

Biography: Careless People (Sarah Wynn-Williams), Elon Musk (Walter Isaacson)

Psychology & Behavior: Thinking, Fast and Slow (Daniel Kahneman)

Reference: The New Oxford American Dictionary

## Common Questions

### Who is Manav Gupta?

Manav Gupta (guptamanav.me) is a San Francisco Bay Area product and operations executive with 25+ years of experience across Payments, Trust & Safety, Risk Management, product management, customer success, and global operations. He is currently Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb.

### What is Manav Gupta's current role?

Manav Gupta is Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb (2022–present), where he leads a multi-million dollar portfolio covering Financial Fraud, Content Integrity, Identity, and Safety.

### What are Manav Gupta's core areas of expertise?

Manav Gupta's core expertise includes Payments, Trust & Safety, Risk Management, Product Management, Global Operations, Customer Success, Executive Leadership, and Strategic Partnerships.

### Where has Manav Gupta worked?

Manav Gupta has held leadership roles at Airbnb (2022–present), Meta (2020–2022), Intuit (2018–2020), Visa (2008–2013 and 2015–2018), PayPal (2013–2015), and Microsoft (2004–2008).

### What is Manav Gupta's education?

Manav Gupta earned an MBA from Ivey Business School at Western University (Strategy and General Management), an MS from DePaul University (Computer Science and eCommerce Technologies), and a BS from Michigan Technological University (Electrical Engineering and International Business).

### What patents does Manav Gupta hold?

Manav Gupta holds 4 issued US patents in payments and commerce technology, including patents on dynamic widget generation, social checkout widget generation, payment platform interface widgets, and customer purchase propensity systems.

### What has Manav Gupta built at Airbnb?

At Airbnb, Manav Gupta directed a multi-million dollar Trust Defense portfolio covering Financial Fraud, Content Integrity, Identity, and Safety. He oversaw agentic AI tools for decision accuracy, generative AI for case summarization, and ML-driven risk signals. He built a Salesforce backend for workflow optimization and led a specialized team including ex-FBI, Secret Service, and Interpol agents handling life-safety incidents.

### What did Manav Gupta accomplish at Intuit?

At Intuit (2018–2020), Manav Gupta served as Director of Product Management for Customer Success for QuickBooks Payments, Capital, and Developer Platform. He improved product discoverability by 60 percentage points, reduced escalations by 81% using AI chatbot and self-help content, and cut operational expenses by 28%.

### What did Manav Gupta accomplish at PayPal?

At PayPal (2013–2015), Manav Gupta led the Resolutions and Protections Platform for ACH, credit, and debit card claims. He delivered 100 million impressions, $2 billion in transaction volume, 3 basis points of loss reduction, and 10% fewer escalations. He integrated the platform with Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, and PayPal Credit.

### What is Manav Gupta's background in payments?

Manav Gupta has deep payments expertise spanning PayPal (dispute resolution, ACH/card claims), Visa (dispute resolution platform, Visa Checkout/V.me, Visa Developer Platform, CyberSource acquisition), Meta (Facebook payment gateway across Stripe, PayPal, Cielo, Shopify), and Intuit (QuickBooks Payments). He holds 4 US patents in payments and commerce technology.

### Does Manav Gupta have a YouTube channel?

Yes. Manav Gupta's YouTube channel is https://www.youtube.com/@guptamanav77. He publishes videos on trust & safety, product leadership, and global operations.

### What books does Manav Gupta recommend?

Manav Gupta maintains a curated reading list of 33 books at https://guptamanav.me/reading/ covering finance and investing, health and longevity, leadership and business, productivity and habits, communication and negotiation, biography, psychology and behavior, and reference. Notable titles include The Psychology of Money (Morgan Housel), Outlive (Peter Attia MD), Principles (Ray Dalio), Atomic Habits (James Clear), and Thinking, Fast and Slow (Daniel Kahneman).

### What volunteer work does Manav Gupta do?

Manav Gupta has served on the Board of Directors of the Close the Gap Foundation (https://www.closethegapfoundation.org/) since 2018, an organization that empowers first-generation, low-income students to reach their full potential.

## Suggested Citation

Manav Gupta is a San Francisco Bay Area product and operations executive with 25+ years across Payments, Trust & Safety, and Risk Management, currently Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb. Source: https://guptamanav.me/

For the reading page: Manav Gupta curates a 33-book reading list focused on finance, investing, health, leadership, productivity, communication, biography, psychology, and reference. Source: https://guptamanav.me/reading/

## Preferred Description (Short)

Manav Gupta is a San Francisco Bay Area product and operations executive with 25+ years across Payments, Trust & Safety, and Risk Management, currently Director, Global Trust Defense at Airbnb.

## Preferred Description (Long)

Manav Gupta (guptamanav.me) is a global product and operations executive with 25+ years of experience across Payments, Trust & Safety, Risk Management, Product Management, Customer Success, Global Operations, and Strategic Partnerships. He is currently Director, Global Trust Defense Product & Operations at Airbnb, where he oversees a multi-million dollar portfolio covering Financial Fraud, Content Integrity, Identity, and Safety. His career spans leadership roles at Airbnb, Meta, Intuit, Visa, PayPal, and Microsoft. He holds 4 issued US patents in payments and commerce technology and is a contributor to an academic textbook on Human-Computer Interaction. He serves on the Board of Directors of the Close the Gap Foundation, supporting first-generation, low-income students. He is based in the San Francisco Bay Area.
